typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-none font-semibold

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Bento Grid (Tetris Mode) for Portfolio, Control Room Grid for Menu/Services

buttons.primary: bg-[#E6B04D] text-[#0B1511] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-sm hover:bg-[#F4C674] transition-all px-8 py-4
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#E6B04D] text-[#E6B04D] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-sm hover:bg-[#E6B04D]/10 transition-all px-8 py-4

cards.default: bg-[#121E18] border border-[#E6B04D]/10 p-6 rounded-sm hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-[#E6B04D]/30 transition-all shadow-lg

inputs.default: bg-[#0B1511] border border-[#E6B04D]/20 text-[#FAF7F2] rounded-sm focus:border-[#E6B04D] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E6B04D]

tags.veg: bg-green-500/10 text-green-400 border border-green-500/20 px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded-sm
tags.spicy: bg-red-500/10 text-red-400 border border-red-500/20 px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded-sm
tags.live_counter: bg-[#E6B04D]/10 text-[#E6B04D] border border-[#E6B04D]/20 px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider

hero_feast.description: Close-up of a premium Indian vegetarian feast in copper bowls, rich dark moody lighting, saffron threads, vibrant marigold petals on a dark textured wooden table.

live_counter.description: Elegant outdoor chaat and street food live counter at an evening Indian pre-wedding function, warm glowing ambient string lights.

corporate_setup.description: Luxury corporate catering buffet setup, symmetrical modern layout, elegant silver chafing dishes on black marble tables.

signature_dishes.description: Overhead shot of an elegant thali with vibrant North and South Indian vegetarian dishes, rich saffron, deep red curries.

corporate_logo_1.description: Minimalist abstract geometric corporate logo, white lines on pure black background

corporate_logo_2.description: Elegant typography corporate logo, abstract monogram, white on pure black background

corporate_logo_3.description: Modern corporate logo, sleek abstract shape, white on pure black background

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all fonts are imported via Google Fonts (Playfair Display and Outfit).
Avoid generic Tailwind styles. Use pure HTML + Tailwind for all layout containers. Only use Shadcn for complex inputs, select, forms.
Do NOT use pure white or pure black. Use #FAF7F2 for white and #0B1511 for black.
For Hero section, use 'hero_feast' image with a bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0B1511]/90 via-[#0B1511]/60 to-transparent overlay so text remains highly readable.
Include data-testid on ALL interactive and key informational elements. Kebab-case, role-based naming (e.g. data-testid='hero-cta-quote').
Create a multi-step form for Instant Quote Builder using state (event -> count -> cuisine -> services -> live counters).
For images, apply a dark theme filter if necessary or use inner shadow to blend them into the dark UI.
Do not build a hamburger menu on desktop. Build proper navigation links.
Do not use card components blindly for marketing page. Build pure HTML/CSS bento grid for Portfolio.
App must be fully responsive, focusing heavily on mobile UI, since it's a mobile web app.
